  • Changelog

Extract model coefficients

Source: R/PLNfit-S3methods.R
coef.PLNfit.Rd

Extracts model coefficients from objects returned by PLN() and its variants

# S3 method for class 'PLNfit'
coef(object, type = c("main", "covariance"), ...)

Arguments

object

an R6 object with class PLNfit

type

type of parameter that should be extracted. Either "main" (default) for $$B$$ or "covariance" for $$\Sigma$$

...

additional parameters for S3 compatibility. Not used

Value

A matrix of coefficients extracted from the PLNfit model.

See also

sigma.PLNfit(), vcov.PLNfit(), standard_error.PLNfit()

Examples

data(trichoptera)
trichoptera <- prepare_data(trichoptera$Abundance, trichoptera$Covariate)
myPLN <- PLN(Abundance ~ 1 + offset(log(Offset)), data = trichoptera)
#> 
#>  Initialization...
#>  Adjusting a full covariance PLN model with builtin optimizer
#>  Post-treatments...
#>  DONE!
coef(myPLN) ## B
#>                   Che       Hyc       Hym      Hys        Psy       Aga
#> (Intercept) -8.158631 -8.290999 -2.975689 -7.08604 -0.5347968 -4.059675
#>                   Glo       Ath       Cea       Ced       Set       All
#> (Intercept) -6.347022 -6.039742 -7.202075 -3.640479 -4.440864 -4.898879
#>                   Han       Hfo       Hsp       Hve       Sta
#> (Intercept) -4.907388 -6.253897 -4.346622 -6.827365 -2.888081
coef(myPLN, type = "covariance") ## Sigma
#>              Che          Hyc         Hym         Hys           Psy
#> Che  2.515492804 -0.008823381  0.36205837  0.44632332 -0.0175187742
#> Hyc -0.008823381  1.873939642  0.10687879  0.26248197 -0.1440291288
#> Hym  0.362058365  0.106878788  1.24696913  0.86544952 -0.1168974892
#> Hys  0.446323322  0.262481975  0.86544952  2.65858031 -0.1443238883
#> Psy -0.017518774 -0.144029129 -0.11689749 -0.14432389  0.0757397543
#> Aga  0.307668273 -0.125707226  0.51734361  0.43089818  0.0001343316
#> Glo  0.089854886  0.165753833  0.20810461  0.33855295 -0.0484050436
#> Ath  0.353185714  0.105091588  0.38575858  0.60569054 -0.0463372700
#> Cea -0.018658154  0.012044288 -0.04645262 -0.03410224  0.0005332628
#> Ced  0.338492563  0.218246349  0.50793888  0.67941730 -0.0972715798
#> Set -0.061092210  0.472846161 -0.18966488  0.13065519 -0.0912527466
#> All  0.272107799 -0.258651723  0.68543035  0.37533805 -0.0049673826
#> Han -0.189708015  0.624251656  0.19799524  0.12275867 -0.2909488577
#> Hfo -0.375055425  0.562104784 -0.41675848 -0.20482965 -0.1473813812
#> Hsp -0.459961394  0.672743354 -0.36138140 -0.20671806 -0.1925000147
#> Hve  0.312649733 -0.129426034  0.16498290  0.24509647  0.0453414104
#> Sta  0.362460402  0.256318086  0.47722219  0.61300074 -0.1215075360
#>               Aga          Glo         Ath           Cea         Ced
#> Che  0.3076682732  0.089854886  0.35318571 -0.0186581538  0.33849256
#> Hyc -0.1257072263  0.165753833  0.10509159  0.0120442877  0.21824635
#> Hym  0.5173436145  0.208104608  0.38575858 -0.0464526239  0.50793888
#> Hys  0.4308981799  0.338552954  0.60569054 -0.0341022423  0.67941730
#> Psy  0.0001343316 -0.048405044 -0.04633727  0.0005332628 -0.09727158
#> Aga  1.0969528928 -0.060273030  0.20025968 -0.0476758993  0.22108339
#> Glo -0.0602730295  1.115674856  0.22237382  0.0034831368  0.22419806
#> Ath  0.2002596800  0.222373820  1.37192592 -0.0134219343  0.44179440
#> Cea -0.0476758993  0.003483137 -0.01342193  0.1130596993 -0.01484497
#> Ced  0.2210833912  0.224198056  0.44179440 -0.0148449696  0.95815188
#> Set -0.3011175994  0.290080384  0.09195452  0.0338686134  0.19251318
#> All  0.5919033701 -0.074255746  0.09146134 -0.0545954154  0.08196091
#> Han -0.1753136507 -0.199117116 -0.20904009  0.0099972406  0.05225171
#> Hfo -0.8254631436  0.299175195 -0.17370172  0.0586679919 -0.14373543
#> Hsp -0.7898490893  0.246023877 -0.23968715  0.0538562415 -0.12952680
#> Hve  0.1861588967  0.089894719  0.24428941 -0.0144462125  0.20568745
#> Sta  0.4396761571  0.015877033  0.30714467 -0.0280054760  0.43453542
#>             Set          All          Han         Hfo         Hsp         Hve
#> Che -0.06109221  0.272107799 -0.189708015 -0.37505543 -0.45996139  0.31264973
#> Hyc  0.47284616 -0.258651723  0.624251656  0.56210478  0.67274335 -0.12942603
#> Hym -0.18966488  0.685430350  0.197995237 -0.41675848 -0.36138140  0.16498290
#> Hys  0.13065519  0.375338054  0.122758669 -0.20482965 -0.20671806  0.24509647
#> Psy -0.09125275 -0.004967383 -0.290948858 -0.14738138 -0.19250001  0.04534141
#> Aga -0.30111760  0.591903370 -0.175313651 -0.82546314 -0.78984909  0.18615890
#> Glo  0.29008038 -0.074255746 -0.199117116  0.29917520  0.24602388  0.08989472
#> Ath  0.09195452  0.091461343 -0.209040086 -0.17370172 -0.23968715  0.24428941
#> Cea  0.03386861 -0.054595415  0.009997241  0.05866799  0.05385624 -0.01444621
#> Ced  0.19251318  0.081960911  0.052251715 -0.14373543 -0.12952680  0.20568745
#> Set  1.60088404 -0.686877364 -0.039988422  0.83108192  0.78474796 -0.04264994
#> All -0.68687736  1.805901890  0.020996456 -0.75808117 -0.67244320  0.14838355
#> Han -0.03998842  0.020996456  3.757310295  0.64392978  1.01554179 -0.60923811
#> Hfo  0.83108192 -0.758081170  0.643929777  2.86790121  1.69924869 -0.35286996
#> Hsp  0.78474796 -0.672443196  1.015541786  1.69924869  2.62603545 -0.49527564
#> Hve -0.04264994  0.148383549 -0.609238107 -0.35286996 -0.49527564  1.34563769
#> Sta  0.05587662  0.199078299  0.471255038 -0.26022414 -0.19906017  0.14310418
#>             Sta
#> Che  0.36246040
#> Hyc  0.25631809
#> Hym  0.47722219
#> Hys  0.61300074
#> Psy -0.12150754
#> Aga  0.43967616
#> Glo  0.01587703
#> Ath  0.30714467
#> Cea -0.02800548
#> Ced  0.43453542
